description: Create a retail planogram for a coffee shop display in Wondershare EdrawMax. The planogram must feature a shelving unit with exactly 3 shelves. On the top shelf, place 4 'Premium Beans' items (dark/black) with a '$18.99' price label. On the middle shelf, place 4 'House Blend' items (light/orange) with a '$14.50' price label. On the bottom shelf, place 5 'Travel Mugs' (silver/blue) with a '$24.00' price label. Include the title 'Summer Coffee Display - Planogram A' at the top of the diagram. Save the diagram as /home/ga/Diagrams/coffee_planogram.eddx and export it as /home/ga/Diagrams/coffee_planogram.png.
